ABOUT.TAGLINE: A unified digital platform for patients, specialists and administrators.
ABOUT.PROJECT_DESC: ElitPort is designed to manage appointment booking, specialists, services and patient-side processes in one clear system.

BOOKING_MANAGEMENT.TITLE: Booking Management

SWAL.CANCEL_TEXT: The booking will be marked as cancelled and the slot will become available again.
SWAL.COMPLETE_TEXT: The booking will be marked as completed.
SWAL.CONFIRM_TEXT: The booking will become active and confirmed again.
SWAL.DELETE_TEXT: This action will permanently remove the booking from the system. Do you want to continue?
SWAL.UPDATE_SUCCESS_TEXT: The booking status has been updated.
